title: Claude Fable 5 simulates the solar system and predicts a solar eclipse
summary: Claude Fable 5 built a solar system simulation from physics first principles to derive orbital motion and predict solar eclipses.
writeup: This video shows Claude Fable 5 building a solar system simulation by deriving planetary orbital motion from physics first principles, then using that simulation to predict solar eclipses. It demonstrates the model applying scientific reasoning and simulation to a complex physical system rather than relying on precomputed answers. The key takeaways center on world simulation and spatial reasoning: deriving orbital dynamics from fundamentals and using the resulting model to forecast a specific physical event.
